title: Matcha & Honey
description: Created for enhanced gameplay and performance on vanilla servers.
body:
# Smooth, Optimized, and Vanilla-Friendly! ## Enhance your gameplay with better performance, seamless server compatibility, and a lag-free experience. Perfect for all vanilla enjoyers.
Originally crafted for the Matcha SMP - The Official server of Matcha & Honey! Want to join? Here's the IP: **_Matcha.MyZia.Network_** See you there! ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5954ea575b5e691fe971b844a52c1030c3a3e43d.png)
**Optimization for Performance:** Continual optimization updates ensures that the modpack not only enriches the gameplay but also ensures smooth performance, minimizing lags or glitches. **Seamless Integration:** The modpack seamlessly integrates with our SMP, Matcha, maintaining compatibility and preventing conflicts, so players can enjoy the modifications without any issues. It also works for any vanilla-connectable server. **Compatibility Patches:** Regularly updated compatibility patches ensure that as the server evolves, the modpack stays current and functional, avoiding any compatibility issues that might arise.
